title: inula candida subsp. decalvans
intro: Inula candida subsp. decalvans, also known as Naked Goldensal or Decalvans Inula, is a subspecies of the Inula candida plant, a perennial herb belonging to the sunflower family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Inula candida subsp. decalvans include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, such as tinctures, teas, and salves, which can be used topically to support skin health and overall well-being.
